answer:
We are given \( \mathbf{E} = \mathbf{j} A \cos \omega (t - z/c) \).  
In free space, \( \nabla \times \mathbf{E} = -\mu_0 \frac{\partial \mathbf{H}}{\partial t} \).  
Computing the curl gives \( \mathbf{H} = -\mathbf{i} \frac{A}{c \mu_0} \sin \omega (t - z/c) \), matching option G.

\boxed{G}
